name: proc_creation_win_papercut_print_management_exploitation_indicators
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"* /c *" and process.command_line:"*powershell*" and process.command_line:"*-nop -w hidden*" and process.command_line:"*Invoke-WebRequest*" and process.command_line:"*setup.msi*" and process.command_line:"*-OutFile*") or (process.command_line:"*msiexec *" and process.command_line:"*/i *" and process.command_line:"*setup.msi *" and process.command_line:"*/qn *" and process.command_line:"*IntegratorLogin=fimaribahundq*")
